notableEvents.label: Esmerlyn Valdez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Esmerlyn Valdez grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to first baseman Bryce Harper. Jake Mangum out at 3rd. Esmerlyn Valdez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Esmerlyn Valdez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Esmerlyn Valdez grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to first baseman Bryce Harper. Jake Mangum out at 3rd. Esmerlyn Valdez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn grounds into a double play, shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper. Esmerlyn Valdez out at 2nd. Ryan O'Hearn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Pirates challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Brandon Lowe steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
